mapper.sql: MEMBER_SEQ /*회원_시퀀스*/ , MEMBER_TYPE_CD /*회원_유형_코드*/ , ID /*ID*/ , PASSWORD /*비밀번호*/ , PASSWORD_CHANGE_DT /*비밀번호_변경_일시*/ , NAME /*이름*/ , NICKNAME /*이름*/ , MOBILE_PHONE_NO /*휴대폰번호*/ , RECENT_LOGIN_DT /*최근_로그인_일시*/ , RECENT_CONNECTION_DT /*최근_접속_일시*/ , MEMBER_STATUS_CD /*회원_상태_코드*/ , MEMBER_TYPE_CD /*회원_유형_코드*/ , LOGIN_FAILURE_COUNT /*로그인_실패_횟수*/ , DI /*DI*/
mapper.select:
/* com.matjzing.FrontLoginMapper.selectLogin */ SELECT
FROM MEMBER
UNION ALL
SELECT
FROM DORMANCY_MEMBER

/* com.matjzing.FrontLoginMapper.selectMember */ SELECT
FROM MEMBER WHERE USE_YN = TRUE AND MEMBER_SEQ = #{memberSeq}
mapper.update: /* com.matjzing.FrontLoginMapper.updateRestoreMember */ UPDATE MEMBER A INNER JOIN DORMANCY_MEMBER B ON A.MEMBER_SEQ = B.MEMBER_SEQ SET A.UPDATE_DT = NOW(3) , A.CI = B.CI , A.DI = B.DI , A.ID = B.ID , A.GENDER_CD = B.GENDER_CD , A.PASSWORD = B.PASSWORD , A.PASSWORD_CHANGE_DT = B.PASSWORD_CHANGE_DT , A.NAME = B.NAME , A.NICKNAME = B.NICKNAME , A.MOBILE_PHONE_NO = B.MOBILE_PHONE_NO , A.BIRTHDAY = B.BIRTHDAY , A.MEMBER_STATUS_CD = 'NORMAL' , A.MEMBER_STATUS_CHANGE_DT = NOW(3) , A.BIRTHDAY = B.BIRTHDAY WHERE A.MEMBER_SEQ = #{memberSeq}
mapper.insert: /* com.matjzing.FrontLoginMapper.insertDormancyMember */ INSERT INTO DORMANCY_MEMBER ( MEMBER_SEQ, MEMBER_TYPE_CD, ID, CI, DI, GENDER_CD , TELECOM_SECTION_CD , NATIVE_SECTION_CD, PASSWORD, PASSWORD_CHANGE_DT, NAME, NICKNAME , INTRODUCTION, MOBILE_PHONE_NO, EMAIL, BIRTHDAY, JOIN_DT, RECENT_LOGIN_DT , RECENT_CONNECTION_DT, MEMBER_STATUS_CD, MEMBER_STATUS_CHANGE_DT , AUTO_LOGIN_YN, APP_VERSION, OS_VERSION, OS_SECTION_CD, DEVICE_MODEL_NAME , DEVICE_MARKETING_NO, APP_PUSH_VALUE, SERVICE_TERMS_AGREE_YN , SERVICE_TERMS_AGREE_DT, PERSONAL_INFO_USE_AGREE_YN, PERSONAL_INFO_USE_AGREE_DT , MARKETING_USE_AGREE_YN, MARKETING_USE_AGREE_DT, USE_YN, REGISTER_SEQ , REGISTER_IP, REGISTRATION_DT, UPDATER_SEQ, UPDATER_IP, UPDATE_DT , DORMANCY_CONVERSION_DT ) SELECT MEMBER_SEQ, MEMBER_TYPE_CD, ID, CI, DI, GENDER_CD, TELECOM_SECTION_CD , NATIVE_SECTION_CD, PASSWORD, PASSWORD_CHANGE_DT, NAME, NICKNAME , INTRODUCTION, MOBILE_PHONE_NO, EMAIL, BIRTHDAY, JOIN_DT, RECENT_LOGIN_DT , RECENT_CONNECTION_DT, 'DORMANCY', #{memberStatusChangeDt} , AUTO_LOGIN_YN, APP_VERSION, OS_VERSION, OS_SECTION_CD, DEVICE_MODEL_NAME , DEVICE_MARKETING_NO, APP_PUSH_VALUE, SERVICE_TERMS_AGREE_YN , SERVICE_TERMS_AGREE_DT, PERSONAL_INFO_USE_AGREE_YN, PERSONAL_INFO_USE_AGREE_DT , MARKETING_USE_AGREE_YN, MARKETING_USE_AGREE_DT, USE_YN, REGISTER_SEQ , REGISTER_IP, REGISTRATION_DT, UPDATER_SEQ, UPDATER_IP, UPDATE_DT , NOW(3) FROM MEMBER WHERE MEMBER_SEQ = #{memberSeq}
mapper.select:
/* com.matjzing.FrontLoginMapper.selectDormancyMember */ SELECT
FROM DORMANCY_MEMBER WHERE USE_YN = TRUE AND MEMBER_SEQ = #{memberSeq}
